prompt_text: Personio vs BambooHR pricing and features
response:
# Personio vs BambooHR Comparison

## Pricing

### Personio
- **Starts at:** ~€8-15/employee/month (pricing varies by region)
- **Tiered model** based on features and employee count
- **No per-module pricing** – features bundled by plan tier
- Generally **more expensive** for small teams

### BambooHR
- **Starts at:** $99/month (for up to 10 employees)
- **Per-employee pricing:** ~$8-12/month for larger teams
- **More transparent pricing** calculator
- **Better for small businesses** (under 50 employees)

---

## Key Features Comparison

| Feature | Personio | BambooHR |
|---------|----------|----------|
| **Core HR** | ✅ Strong | ✅ Strong |
| **Payroll Integration** | ✅ Built-in | ❌ Limited (integrations) |
| **Recruiting** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Basic module |
| **Performance Management** | ✅ Advanced | ✅ Available |
| **Time & Attendance** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes |
| **Learning Management** | ✅ Included | ❌ No |
| **Analytics/Dashboards** | ✅ Excellent | ✅ Good |
| **Employee Portal** | ✅ Modern | ✅ User-friendly |
| **Ease of Use** | ⚠️ Steeper learning curve | ✅ Simpler/intuitive |

---

## Best For

### Choose **Personio** if you need:
- Integrated payroll capabilities
- Comprehensive learning/development tools
- All-in-one HR platform
- Mid-to-large teams
- European operations (strong in EU/Germany)

### Choose **BambooHR** if you need:
- **Budget-friendly** solution
- Simple, intuitive interface
- Quick implementation
- Small-to-medium businesses
- Strong US support

---

## Implementation & Support
- **Personio:** 4-8 week implementation, good support
- **BambooHR:** Faster setup, responsive customer service

**Bottom line:** BambooHR is simpler/cheaper; Personio is more comprehensive but pricier.
